positive: Minimalist celestial animal constellation, featuring a stylized, flowing silver wolf howling to a vibrant magenta and sapphire nebula. The wolf is rendered in clean, sharp silhouette against a deep indigo-blue cosmic background, surrounded by geometric constellations and glowing orrery elements. The style should be neo-art deco cosmic psychedelia, with strong, graphic outlines and high contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly scalable for apparel print. Cinematic lighting, deep shadows, cosmic dust texture, elegant symmetry. Full body, symmetrical composition.
